_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Work closely with planners, intelligence analysts, and collection managers to ensure intelligence requirements and collection plans are accurate and up-to-date.
reference_document_element_description: Manage the data and AI investment portfolio, including initiative prioritization, funding allocation, performance tracking against value hypotheses, and portfolio rebalancing based on realized outcomes.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-012 (LS, cosine: 0.498), OP-T-001 (OP, cosine: 0.487).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.491). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [accurate, analysts, closely, collection, date, ensure] vs WIDAI-only terms [against, ai, allocation, based, data, funding] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.864 (P=0.875, R=0.853). P exceeds R by 0.022 — the DCWF element's 20 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (96.0%). "Work closely with planners, intelligence analysts, and collection managers to en" and "Manage the data and AI investment portfolio, including initiative prioritization" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.499 ≈ STS 0.491 (gap 0.009). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [none] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.6%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [accurate, analysts, closely, collection, date, ensure]. WIDAI terms: [against, ai, allocation, based, data, funding].
